data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Upgrade/downgrade with proration', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the use case mentions a member upgrading mid-cycle with a prorated charge applied, there is no concrete evidence or API read that demonstrates the actual implementation of this feature. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary details to confirm the proration logic are missing.
gaps: Lack of evidence demonstrating the implementation of upgrade/downgrade with proration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add proration validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the upgrade API correctly applies prorated charges.
